chunks.title: Preparation for the Ark
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of David preparing a place and assembling Israel.

chunks.title: Levite Leaders by Clan
chunks.reason: Catalog of Levite chiefs and their relatives from specific clans.

chunks.title: David's Instruction to Priests and Levites
chunks.reason: David addresses the leaders, explaining their role and past failure.

chunks.title: Organization of the Levites and Musicians
chunks.reason: Narrative describing the carrying of the ark and appointment of singers.

chunks.title: Procession and Arrival at City of David
chunks.reason: The journey of the ark with music and sacrifice, ending with Michal's reaction.
